plugins.name: pencheff
plugins.description: The world's best AI ethical hacker — an elite penetration testing agent that thinks adversarially, chains vulnerabilities creatively, and leaves no attack surface unexplored. Provide target URL and credentials — the agent orchestrates deep reconnaissance, advanced exploitation, attack chain verification, and professional reporting.
